name: Text
description: A collection of utility classes for controlling text decoration, appearance, flow, sizing, and transformation.

description.default: Removes text decoration and prevents it from appearing on hover and focus. Use u-inherit-color to inherit text color from the parent.

description.style: Applies font weight or style to text.

description.flow: Controls how text wraps or overflows its container. u-nowrap prevents wrapping, u-truncate clips text with an ellipsis.

description.size: Sets relative text size as a percentage of the base font size.

description.name: Sets the font size using a named design token.

modifiers.name: base, lead, caption, marketing, headline, title, subtitle, subtitle-small, meta, brand
